name: geula even
bio: Geula Even-Sa'ar (née Even, Hebrew: גאולה אבן-סער; born 15 June 1972) is an Israeli journalist, radio and television presenter. She hosted the programs "The World This Morning" on Channel 13; "Good Morning Israel" and "Yoman" on Channel 1. She later hosted the evening news bulletin, the news magazine "The Week" and the daily current affairs and interview program "Evening Evening" on Kan 11 until her retirement in December 2018.
